---
title: "Jiho Kim"
image: profile.png
image-alt: "Profile picture"
about:
  template: solana
---

Hi there! I am a junior at <a class="link" href="https://computing.calvin.edu/academics/bcs">Calvin University</a> studying Computer Science. I am currently working as a research assistant with <a class="link" href="https://kenarnold.org">Dr. Kenneth Arnold</a>. We are researching an AI writing tool that gives users more creative freedom and control over their content.

My research interests are in human-computer interaction, natural language processing, and data science. I am actively seeking research opportunities and hoping to pursue a PhD in the future.

**[<a class="link" href="contact/index.qmd">Contact</a>]**
&nbsp;
**[<a class="link" href="/">CV</a>]**
&nbsp;
**[<a class="link" href="https://github.com/nghtctrl">GitHub</a>]**
&nbsp;
**[<a class="link" href="https://linkedin.com/in/nghtctrl">LinkedIn</a>]**
